analysis.name: Powerledger
analysis.summary: POWR 24小时涨幅27.6%，但链上交易量极低（仅0.14美元），流动性虽高但实际交易冷清。基本面为能源区块链项目，无近期重大利好新闻，上涨缺乏明确催化。估值偏高，风险较大。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现实质性合作或产品落地新闻，可重新评估。

catalysts: 无明确近期催化剂，价格异动可能源于低流动性下的异常交易或市场操纵。

fundamentals: Powerledger 是能源区块链项目，提供去中心化能源交易平台。
代币 POWR 为 ERC-20，用于访问平台和支付交易费。
项目自2017年启动，运营超过10个国家。
流通供应5.3亿，最大供应10亿，通胀压力存在。
价格较历史高点1.89美元下跌97%。
marketRead: 24小时涨幅27.6%，但链上交易量仅0.14美元，流动性2495万美元，说明价格变动并非由真实交易驱动。
DEX 交易对 POWR/WETH 流动性高但交易量极低，可能存在报价异常或机器人刷量。
CEX 数据未提供，但链上数据表明当前上涨不可持续。
risks: 链上交易量极低，价格容易被操纵。
无近期利好新闻，上涨缺乏基本面支撑。
代币供应量大，全稀释估值5360万美元，相对市值偏高。
项目属于老牌DePIN，但发展缓慢，竞争激烈。
SEC曾将POWR列为疑似证券，监管风险。
watchlist: 关注是否有官方合作或产品更新公告。
观察链上交易量是否恢复正常水平。
sourceNotes: 链上数据来自DexScreener，交易量极低，可靠性存疑。
新闻均为常规报道，无近期重大事件。
价格异动原因不明，建议谨慎。

profile.name: Powerledger
profile.description: Powerledger (POWR) is a technology company that builds software for distributed and decentralised energy markets for a sustainable future. It has developed a blockchain-based platform that enables the tracking and trading of energy, flexibility services and environmental commodities. Its goal is to provide the platform for a fully modernised, market-driven grid that offers consumers a choice in their energy while driving the democratisation of power. Headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, Powerledger operates in more than 10 countries. Powerledger operates on two blockchain layers; the POWR token is issued on Ethereum as an ERC-20 token, and the Powerledger blockchain - a native Solana based blockchain to process energy transactions on a more scalable network. The POWR token is an ERC-20 token that acts as a licence required for businesses such as; utilities, renewable energy operators, microgrids, companies committed to 100% renewable energy and property developers to access Powerledger’s platform, and will be able to be used to pay for transactions on the Powerledger blockchain in future.
